script: echo '=== All *-bot.service + *-responder.service: which Linux user? ==='; for unit in $(systemctl list-units --type=service --all --no-pager --plain 'claude-*' '*-bot*' '*-responder*' 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $1}' | grep -E '(bot|responder)\.service$' | sort -u); do USER=$(systemctl show $unit -p User --value 2>/dev/null); WORK=$(systemctl show $unit -p WorkingDirectory --value 2>/dev/null); ACTIVE=$(systemctl is-active $unit 2>/dev/null); printf '  %-40s user=%-12s active=%-10s wd=%s\n' "$unit" "$USER" "$ACTIVE" "$WORK"; done; echo; echo '=== Linux users created for bot pattern (uid >= 1000) ==='; awk -F: '$3 >= 1000 && $3 < 65000 {print "  "$1" (uid "$3", home "$6")"}' /etc/passwd | sort
